name: CAD Viewer (DXF/DWG)
description: Renders AutoCAD DXF/DWG engineering drawings inline. DWG support uses a GPLv3 WASM module loaded on demand.
author: zouwei
aiHint:
Use ```dxf for DXF files, ```dwg for DWG files, or ```morcad for parameter mode. Examples:
```dxf
./drawings/floor-plan.dxf
```
```morcad
file: ./drawings/floor-plan.dxf
layers: WALLS, DOORS
height: 500
```
